summary: Tested Phase B features: Coach Privacy Settings UI/API, Player Commitment Status, Player Messages Reply UI, Coach Messages Replied badge, Coach Dashboard Analytics (6 KPI cards with Programme Views). Backend tests: 10/12 passed. PATCH /api/coach/auth/privacy returns 500 (migration v18 not run - privacy_settings column missing). GET privacy works gracefully.

critical.issue: Returns 500 Internal Server Error. Root cause: `privacy_settings` column missing from coach_accounts table - migration v18 not yet run in Supabase. Error: PGRST204 'Could not find privacy_settings column in schema cache'

integration_issues.issue: Save Privacy button triggers PATCH /api/coach/auth/privacy which returns 500 (due to missing DB column from migration v18). UI shows error toast but settings don't persist.

action_items: CRITICAL: Run Supabase migration v18 to add privacy_settings JSONB column to coach_accounts table. File: /app/memory/supabase_migration_v18.sql
Run migration v16 to add player_reply columns to coach_messages (enables player reply POST endpoint)
Run migration v17 to add commitment_status to profiles (enables player commitment status persistence)
Run migration v19 to create coach_programme_views table (enables non-zero Programme Views counts)
critical_code_review_comments: PATCH /api/coach/auth/privacy: No error handling wrapping the Supabase update - consider adding try/except similar to analytics programme_views fallback
GET /api/coach/auth/privacy: Works correctly because it reads coach.get('privacy_settings') which returns {} gracefully when column is NULL/missing
coach_programme_views table missing (404 in logs) but backend has try/except fallback - returns {all_time:0, last_7d:0, last_30d:0} correctly

success_rate.frontend: 90% (all UI elements present and interactive; Save Privacy fails due to backend 500)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Migrations v16-v19 need to be run in Supabase. After v18 is run, PATCH /api/coach/auth/privacy should work. After v16, player reply POST endpoint should work. After v19, programme views counts will be non-zero. All UI components for Phase B are correctly implemented - privacy toggles, commitment status dropdown, reply textarea, coach messages Replied badge are all present in DOM.
rca_of_issue: PATCH /api/coach/auth/privacy fails with 500 because Supabase migration v18 (which adds privacy_settings JSONB column to coach_accounts) has not been run. The backend tries to UPDATE privacy_settings column which doesn't exist, causing PGRST204 error from PostgREST. Fix: Run migration v18 in Supabase Dashboard SQL Editor.
